overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person journey down a mountain river. The footage features a complete day-night-day time-lapse cycle with the camera moving steadily through the water, passing from daylight through starry night to a bright sunrise, revealing detailed water physics and natural forest environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain river valley with rocky cliffs

events.description: sun sets behind mountains, sky darkening from day to twilight
transition from dusk to night, sky becoming dark blue with stars visible

agents.ego_description: moving steadily downstream through the river as daylight fades into darkness

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain cliff with forested slopes rising in the distance
cluster of white-barked birch trees lining the right riverbank
dark green coniferous trees on the left bank and mountain slopes
flowing river water with visible current and ripples
atmospheric mist hovering over the water surface and among trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain river valley with a prominent rocky cliff face ahead. The camera moves forward through the water as the lighting transitions from bright afternoon to twilight and then to night. White birch trees line the right bank while evergreens cover the left slopes, with mist drifting across the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: nighttime river valley transitioning to dawn

events.description: sunrise begins on the left horizon, sky brightening from night to dawn
sun clears the horizon creating bright lens flare and reflections on the water

agents.ego_description: continuing downstream through the river as dawn breaks and sunlight begins to illuminate the valley

entered.detail: bright sun appearing on the left horizon during sunrise
golden reflection of the sun stretching across the water surface

segments.scene_description: Navigating through the river during the night-to-dawn transition, the scene shifts from dark blue starry skies to a bright sunrise. The sun appears on the left horizon, casting long golden reflections across the water. The rocky cliffs move to the right as the camera progresses downstream, with the birch forest now closer on the right bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest river in morning light

events.description: camera turns left to follow the river bend, revealing more dense forest on the banks
water becomes shallow and crystal clear, revealing rocky pebble riverbed beneath the surface

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow waters with bright morning sun reflecting off the clear surface, revealing the riverbed below

entered.detail: clear shallow water revealing rocky and pebble-strewn riverbed below
thick forest of tall trees creating a dense canopy along the riverbanks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the river in full morning daylight, with the camera moving through increasingly shallow water. The rocky cliffs have receded into the distance, replaced by dense forest canopy lining the banks. The water becomes crystal clear, revealing the pebble-strewn riverbed below, while bright sunlight creates sparkling reflections on the surface as the camera follows the river's bend.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement down a mountain river as the environment transforms from a twilight valley into a bright, sunlit forest. It begins by gliding through a wide river valley toward a rocky cliff face, with the lighting shifting from bright afternoon to a starry night while mist drifts between banks of birch and evergreen trees. As the camera progresses downstream, the dark blue sky transitions into a vivid sunrise on the left horizon, casting long golden reflections across the water and shifting the cliffs to the right. The scene then opens into full morning daylight, where the rocky terrain recedes to make way for a dense forest canopy lining the banks. Finally, the camera follows a bend in the river through increasingly shallow, crystal-clear water that reveals a pebble-strewn riverbed beneath sparkling sunlight.
